TMT.Plex: TMT plex number indicating the multiplexing level.
TMT.Channel: TMT channel identifier for sample labeling.
Ischemia.Time.in.Minutes: Time in minutes from ischemia onset to sample collection.
PAM50: PAM50 subtype classification of the tumor.
NMF.Cluster: NMF clustering result indicating the cluster membership of the sample.
NMF.Cluster.Membership.Score: Score indicating the confidence of cluster membership.
Age.in.Month: Age of the patient in months at the time of sample collection.
Sample.IDs: Unique identifiers for each sample, possibly including project codes or batch numbers.
Ethnicity: Subject's ethnic background, primarily black or white.
ER.Updated.Clinical.Status: Estrogen receptor clinical status, consistently negative.
PR.Clinical.Status: Progesterone receptor clinical status, consistently negative.
ERBB2.Updated.Clinical.Status: HER2 clinical status, often unknown, negative when known.
TNBC.Updated.Clinical.Status: Triple-negative breast cancer status, consistently positive.
ERBB2.Gene.Amplified: HER2 gene amplification status, consistently negative.
TOP2A.Gene.Amplified: TOP2A gene amplification status, consistently negative.
CD3.TILS.Status: Status of CD3 positive Tumor Infiltrating Lymphocytes (TILS) test.
CD3.TILS.Counts: Counts of CD3 positive Tumor Infiltrating Lymphocytes (TILS).
APOBEC.Signature: Indicator of APOBEC mutational signature presence.
Measure of chromosomal instability in cancer cells.
Stemness.Score: Quantitative measure indicating the stem-like properties of cells.
TP53.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the TP53 gene.
PIK3CA.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the PIK3CA gene.
PTEN.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the PTEN gene.
MAP3K1.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the MAP3K1 gene.
AKT1.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the AKT1 gene.
GATA3.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the GATA3 gene.
CBFB.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the CBFB gene.
KMT2C.Mutation.Type: Type of genetic mutation observed in the KMT2C gene.
SF3B1.Mutation.Type: Type of mutation in SF3B1 gene (e.g., missense, in-frame deletion).
ARID1A.Mutation.Type: Type of mutation in ARID1A gene (e.g., frameshift insertion, missense, intronic).
MLLT4.Mutation.Type: Type of mutation in MLLT4 gene (e.g., missense, frameshift insertion).
TP53.Mutation.Status: Mutation status of TP53 gene (1 indicates mutation present, 0 indicates absence).
PIK3CA.Mutation.Status: Mutation status of PIK3CA gene (1 indicates mutation present, 0 indicates absence).
PTEN.Mutation.Status: Mutation status of PTEN gene (1 indicates mutation present, 0 indicates absence).
MAP3K1.Mutation.Status: Mutation status of MAP3K1 gene (1 indicates mutation present, 0 indicates absence).
AKT1.Mutation.Status: Mutation status of AKT1 gene (1 indicates mutation present, 0 indicates absence).
GATA3.Mutation.Status: Mutation status of GATA3 gene (1 indicates mutation present, 0 indicates absence).
CBFB.Mutation.Status: Mutation status of CBFB gene (1 indicates mutation present, 0 indicates absence).
KMT2C.Mutation.Status: Indicates presence or absence of mutation in KMT2C gene.
SF3B1.Mutation.Status: Indicates presence or absence of mutation in SF3B1 gene.
ARID1A.Mutation.Status: Indicates presence or absence of mutation in ARID1A gene.
MLLT4.Mutation.Status: Indicates presence or absence of mutation in MLLT4 gene.
